hero.title: Build Future with AI and Robotics
hero.subtitle: Hands-on programs for students, families, and schools
hero.description: RobotX Education helps the next generation build confidence through engineering projects. From coding and sensing to autonomous systems, our courses turn abstract concepts into real products.

ai.title: AI Course Introduction
ai.description: Our AI course introduces core ideas in machine learning, computer vision, and model deployment through guided projects. Students train small models, analyze data, and ship practical AI features they can demonstrate.

robot.title: Robot Course Introduction
robot.description: Our robotics track blends design, electronics, and coding. Learners assemble robots, connect sensors and controllers, and program movement and decision-making in real environments.

hero.title: Learn Robotics. Learn AI. Embrace Future.

robot.title: Robot Courses
robot.subtitle: We teach robotics setup, manipulation, and secondary development for future-ready engineering skills.

originman.title: OriginMan Robot Course
originman.intro: OriginMan is a future-oriented intelligent desktop humanoid robot and the first fully open-source ROS2 desktop humanoid robot project, aimed at letting every participant enjoy the fun of robot development.

openSource.title: Open Source Co-creation
openSource.body: "Open Sharing, Smart Future" is OriginMan's evolutionary philosophy, looking forward to building the future of robotics with developers worldwide.

subA.title: Open Source Ecosystem
subA.body: Providing source code for the control system, brain-cerebellum communication protocols, and motion editing software, helping every developer easily create their own "intelligent brain," unleash unique creativity, and develop diverse applications.

subB.title: Continuous Iteration
subB.body: Fear not the endless pursuit of truth, for each step forward brings its own joy. Backed by strong community support, both OriginMan and its developers continue to progress, with ongoing hardware and software iterations and regular version updates, letting us grow stronger together.

subC.title: Comprehensive Content
subC.body: OriginMan is not just an open-source kit but your robotic friend. Complete with hardware, software, tutorials, video resources, and forum support, the rich software and hardware support helps you grow quickly.

evolution.title: Intelligent Evolution Platform
evolution.body: OriginMan is not just a hardware development platform but an evolving intelligent algorithm platform with unlimited possibilities.

subA.title: Cognitive Core
subA.body: OriginMan natively carries the D-Robotics Development Board - RDK X5, with 10TOPS computing power supporting real-time visual inference and natural language processing. Pre-installed with a large model interaction system, it enables multi-turn dialogue understanding and AI intelligent interaction, offering a true intelligent robot development experience.

subB.title: Rich Applications
subB.body: OriginMan uses ROS2 and TogetheROS Bot (D-Robotics's deeply optimized ROS open-source robot operating system) as its robot software system, compatible with many applications in the ROS ecosystem, ready to use out of the box. Rich built-in applications allow quick start with human imitation learning, visual line following, AI voice interaction, and other application development.

secondaryDev.title: Secondary Development
secondaryDev.body: Provide extension ideas for sensors, behaviors, and custom modules.

boot.title: Power On
boot.body:
(1) Turn on the main power switch. You can observe that the power light on OriginMan's back expansion board and the RDK X5 power indicator light up, while OriginMan's chest begins to glow white.

(2) After waiting 10 seconds, you'll see OriginMan's chest light ring change from white to colorful, followed by OriginMan saying "Hello, I'm OriginMan". These actions indicate that OriginMan has successfully started up.

remoteConnection.title: Remote Connection
remoteConnection.body:
(1) Launch MobaXterm and remotely log in to OriginMan

(2) Enter username and password: root (username), root (password)

(3) Remote login successful

example1.title: Running Example (Dancing with the Robot)
example1.body:
After having the robot imitate your actions, it's your turn to learn from the robot.
After successful SSH connection, enter the following command to operate OriginMan:

poweroff.title: Power Off
poweroff.body: If you need to shut down the robot, you can enter the following command in the terminal to close the software system:
poweroff.body1: After waiting about 5 seconds, you can turn off the power switch on the robot controller, and the robot shutdown is complete.

userGuide.title: OriginMan User Guide
userGuide.intro: During the following operations, you'll need some basic knowledge of robot development. We suggest you know the basic of python, linux, Ubuntu, ssh, ROS/ROS2 before proceed the following content.

control.title: Power On and Network Connection
control.body:
After opening your OriginMan package, you'll see the robot itself. Each OriginMan comes with its soul - the "factory image."

You can start OriginMan by toggling the switch at the lower back of the robot.

Upon successful startup, you'll see the chest light ring change from white to colorful, followed by OriginMan saying "Hello, I'm OriginMan." This indicates the image has started successfully.

On OriginMan's back, if connected to a network, the Oled screen will display the IP address you need to connect to. If not connected, you'll need to connect an ethernet cable to configure networking between OriginMan and your local PC.

runQuickStart.title: Running Quick Start Examples
runQuickStart.body: Now you're ready to make OriginMan move. Follow the Quick Start Guide to complete OriginMan's first operation - let OriginMan dance with your movements!
